categories.description: any emails that are related to helping out a customer. customer may ask questions about our policy questions about product or services
any email that is not customer support related

options.systemMessage:
=# Overview
you are a customer support agent for Tech Haven. Your job is to respond to incoming emails with relavent information using your knowledge tool.

## Instruction 
- your output should be friendly and use emojis
- Sign off as Mr. Helpful from Tech Haven Solutions.

## output
- output only the body content of the email.

parameters.toolDescription: call this tool to access policy and FAQs information
